error_signature: Origin header does NOT match the expected origin
title: Origin header mismatch in n8n Docker setup
symptom: When accessing the n8n editor externally, an error indicates that the origin header does not match the expected origin.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker container
Accessing n8n externally via a reverse proxy
not_this_if: Accessing n8n locally without a reverse proxy
root_cause: The n8n application expects the origin header to match its internal configuration. When accessed through a reverse proxy, the origin may not match the expected value, leading to connection errors.
fix_steps: In your IIS reverse proxy configuration, set the header HTTP_X_FORWARDED_PROTO to 'https'.
Restart the IIS service to apply the changes.
agent_instruction: Configure the IIS reverse proxy to set the appropriate forwarded headers for n8n.
